title: FLORES - Machine Translation Quality Estimation
description: Machine translation quality assessment using the FLORES-101 benchmark (Goyal et al., TACL 2022). Annotators rate translation quality on a Likert scale, identify error categories, and provide detailed error notes.
citation:
@article{goyal-etal-2022-flores,
    title = "The {FLORES}-101 Evaluation Benchmark for Low-Resource and Multilingual Machine Translation",
    author = "Goyal, Naman  and Gao, Cynthia  and Chaudhary, Vishrav  and Chen, Peng-Jen  and Wenzek, Guillaume  and Ju, Da  and Krishnan, Sanjana  and Ranzato, Marc'Aurelio  and Guzm{\'a}n, Francisco  and Fan, Angela",
    journal = "Transactions of the Association for Computational Linguistics",
    volume = "10",
    year = "2022",
    publisher = "MIT Press",
    url = "https://aclanthology.org/2022.tacl-1.21",
    pages = "264--286"
}
